name: Syra Coffee Santa Clara
summary: Reliable specialty-coffee chain stop in central Girona with published hours and an easy Old Town/river position.
whyItMatters: Good low-friction Girona coffee option when the group wants dependable hours rather than a purely vibes-based cafe hunt.
pros: Official Syra page lists the Santa Clara address and weekend hours
European Coffee Trip lists Girona as a specialty coffee city and Syra is a Barcelona/Girona specialty roaster
Central river location should work well before walking the Barri Vell
cons: Chain feel, less cycling-cafe personality than Espresso Mafia or La Fabrica
Hours should still be rechecked close to the trip

logistics.opening_hours: Mon-Fri 08:00-19:00; Sat-Sun 09:00-19:00, per Syra location page accessed 2026-06-22
logistics.distance_from_base: Central Girona; exact lodging distance unknown
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Not tied to a race viewing point
logistics.transit: Walkable from Girona center; verify from lodging
logistics.road_closure_notes: No race-day closure research found for this non-viewing stop

timing.best_visit_window: Morning before Girona walking or cycling plans
timing.race_day_risk: Low unless city events affect central Girona
